item.title: Donald Sutherland will be missed. I always loved his reaction here from Kelly's Heroes. So here it is in Intergalactic Quality.

item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax

item.title: The 449th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2024 ep 9
item.description:
IT'S TRANS SUPPORT THURSDAY! Normally I only do these on Tuesdays, but today's Trans Support MeeMay Dump is dedicated to @KickingAndScreaming in response to their post yesterday requesting Transgender-Supportive Memes. https://imgur.com/gallery/WaFtC6b I urge everyone to send them your love and support in the comments of their post, especially in the form of Memes.
KickingAndScreaming, remember you are not alone and that progress *is* being made worldwide in the area of LGBTQIA+ Equal Rights. It's slow progress, but it's progress.
My addition at the bottom I totally missed that he shouldn't be calling her "son"
I wish
Stay in the safe states until we make it all safe.
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays.
BLO HAI or BLUH HAI are the two acceptable pronunciations.
YES
It says Memorandum Of The Trans Agenda 1. Be treated with basic dignity and respect. 2. See Above
Also, Jesus used the word "I" quite a lot. "I" is a pronoun.
Mobile Task Force Male To Female Monster Tiddie Fucker Monday Tuesday Friday
Fuckin creeps
Lawful good and chaotic evil should be switched around
Tuck it back and tape it if you don't want it to show.
I don't see a problem with that.
They wouldn't say that, but they definitely would think it.
A small win is still a win
I think this only works for Trans people.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Hey Chris
item.description: by Natural Habitat Shorts "Platypus don't have teats, instead they concentrate milk to their belly and feed their young by sweating it out. Only female platypus can do this"

item.title: The Return of the Meme: 1249 (overencucumbered)

It's morning. Let's get this bread.

item.title: Weight loss of 100+ pounds

Me today

item.title: Ṣiva H. Viṣṇu, just mind your own business, right?
item.description: It makes no sense, but cultists gonna cult. Whoops. MV unexpected. Keep being excellent to one another the way you always do, and pull the Democratic lever in the voting booth so hard that they feel the seismic vibrations in Timbuktu. (Yes, I know that's an ancient reference but I'm old.) Edit: Thanks for the accolade!
item.dc:creator: AyatollahBahloni
